experiment: nsk1 B-double-prime (B2P) Stage-0 KEYED internal-channel probe at R3 (source-keyed counterfactual-pair discrimination, additive norm-matched contrastive injection, SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct zero-shot, CLUTRR entity form, 958 covered items, 9-cell layer grid; the control-unpassable redesign commissioned by the post-B-prime maintainer REDESIGN fork)
candidate: nsk1 flagship line (neurosym-kernel-internals): does a residual-stream write deliver item-specific CONTENT that the host's computation can read out - the channel-existence half of the internal-vs-external grounding question that B-prime failed to measure?
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json alongside nsk1-bprime and nsk1-g2d. IMPORTANT SCOPE: nsk1 has NO frozen SAP, NO results-log, NO verdict object - B2P is a pre-freeze fork diagnostic, every row phase:exploratory (quarantined, uncitable, flips no verdict). This assessment interprets a run whose MECHANICAL gate label is PASS-KEYED (spec section 5 rule 2), the programme's FIRST positive delivery-mode reading. Evidentiary grade throughout: MEASURED-exploratory, strictly below verdict grade. A PASS-KEYED here licenses the spec's pre-stated section 8 PASS path (nsk1 redesign at R3 around internal delivery) as the maintainer's fork input; it flips no verdict, freezes nothing, and the programme's verdict-grade bottom line (zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null) is UNCHANGED.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per the kern Fable/Opus execution split: the runner (Opus, experiment-runner role) executed B2P on Modal (run committed at b404754) and reported mechanical facts plus one flagged operational instantiation (the disc-c100 deranged-arm operator, non-binding); what the numbers MEAN - what PASS-KEYED establishes, its scope bounds, the delivery-topology update, the thesis implications, and the next-step recommendation - is decided here and only here. The runner-flagged disc-c100 instantiation is CONFIRMED below. This record interprets; it does not run, grade, or audit, and it commits the maintainer to nothing.

bprime2.registry_status: nsk1 DRAFT (never frozen); B2P authorised by the maintainer's REDESIGN choice at the post-B-prime fork (registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json fork_recommendation rank 1), spec docs/next/nsk1-bprime2-spec.md (ASM-0200..0204), run 2026-07-10 by the runner role on Modal (A10G, fp32, greedy where generating, chat template), 14,914 rows, 0.206 GPU-h, ~USD 0.23, 752.7 s wall, no abort, no cap trip, no partial
bprime2.mechanical_gate_label: PASS-KEYED (spec section 5 rule 2; instrument VALID - no abort, headroom_ok, repro 958/958, and keyacc_coin Wilson-LB(z=2.7730) < 0.5 at every one of the 9 completed cells, max coin LB 0.423)
bprime2.results_log: none (pre-freeze diagnostic; outputs under poc/nsk1/out/bprime2/, phase:exploratory)
bprime2.cells: 9 = lh in {12,16,20} x lt in {8,12,16} at L=24; pivot (16,12) for alpha calibration + generation secondaries; Swept = all 200 text-only failures (full F, no subsample); C100 = 100 seed-pinned text-only-correct items, disjoint from Swept; alpha* = 1.0 (largest ladder value with name-collapse <= 0.10; measured collapse 0.0156)
bprime2.gate_rule: spec section 5 / ASM-0202: PASS-KEYED iff at some completed cell Wilson-LB(keyacc_real, z=2.5427, i.e. 1-0.05/9) >= 0.70 AND paired real>coin (exact one-sided sign test p<0.05) AND paired real>role (p<0.05); FWER <= 0.05 by the corrected-LB conjunct alone; coin control E[success] <= 0.5 by arithmetic (coin-XOR construction, ASM-0200)

harness.note: bprime2 entrypoint appended per the spec's operational-choice clause (g2/g2b/g2c/g2d/bprime entrypoints untouched); run committed at b404754; every disc/baseline row stores both raw candidate logprobs, so the entire gate was recomputed offline by this role (see analyst_recount) with EXACT agreement

spec.note: pre-declared decision rule, controls, floor, multiplicity correction, and post-outcome paths; ASM-0200..0204

predecessors.bprime: registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json (INSTRUMENT-INVALID; the structural confound B2P was built to remove)
predecessors.g2d: registry/assessments/nsk1-g2d.json (the text-delivery-channel negative B2P contrasts with)

measurement_refs.scope_note: Every number in this assessment: SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct pinned commit 31b70e2e869a7173562077fd711b654946d38674, zero-shot, CLUTRR entity form 2, the 958-item covered set (ASM-0203 contact discipline), fp32 chat template, additive norm-matched contrastive injection at the final prompt-token position at alpha=1.0, teacher-forced paired logprob margins for the gate, n=200 swept failures per cell, phase:exploratory. Citing any of them wider re-classifies the citation as EXTRAPOLATION.

_surprise_note: ASM-0204's sizing prior (a working mid-stack content channel should key at roughly >= 0.8 on a two-candidate discrimination, EXTRAPOLATION, sizing-only) put the design in the right power band, but nothing in the registry predicted (a) that keying would be this CLEAN - 0.81/0.85 at two cells against coin controls sitting at 0.505-0.510 with paired p down to 4e-13 - or (b) that it would be this LOCALISED: keying exists only at injection layer lt=16 (2/3 depth) with harvest lh in {12,16}, is absent at every lt in {8,12} cell (real 0.42-0.50, indistinguishable from coin), and attenuates at lh=20 (0.605, ns after correction). The programme's first positive delivery-mode reading arrives with a measured layer topology attached.

interpretation.headline: B2P is PASS-KEYED on a VALID instrument, and the interpretation licensed by the spec's own pre-fixed boundary is: content-specific internal steering EXISTS at R3 - a single-position additive residual-stream write at the final prompt token delivers ITEM-SPECIFIC content (which of two counterfactual names was injected) that the host's forward computation reads out, at 2 of 9 grid cells, beating both the arithmetic-chance coin control AND the role-consistent deranged control with FWER <= 0.05 [MEASURED-exploratory: poc/nsk1/out/bprime2/bprime2_summary.json sha256 0ee800f7f7d1aec0aa245986aa9a27a15017ebc33d5780a9cb4104da366f76f1; cells (12,16) keyacc_real 0.810, Wilson-LB(z=2.5427) 0.730, paired vs coin p=1.35e-10, vs role p=8.87e-07; (16,16) 0.850, LB 0.775, p=4.11e-13 / 9.06e-11; effect sizes m(+)-m(-): real +2.82/+2.80 vs role +0.59/+0.81 vs coin +0.10/-0.07, against a baseline unhooked margin of mean 0.62]. The role-control conjunct is what makes this ITEM-keyed rather than merely direction-keyed: the same deranged vector under the same fixed key-to-sign assignment moves margins only +0.6-0.8, so the signal tracks WHICH item's counterfactual pair was injected, not a generic top-vs-bridge direction. This is the FIRST positive delivery mode in the programme's delivery topology, and it lands in direct contrast to the text channel measured on the same items at the same host: the engine's fact delivered as prompt text was net-harmful with zero rescues (g2d: 0.76 -> 0.43, 0/24 rescued), while the same content class delivered as a contrastive residual write is cleanly readable. Delivery topology, not content, was the binding failure - now measured from both sides. Scope bound, fixed by the spec BEFORE the run and untouched here: PASS-KEYED establishes content DELIVERY (at least echo-grade readable content); whether the computation INTEGRATES it as grounding - rescuing real generations on real tasks - is Stage-1's question, and this record does not advance it.

analyst_recount._method: Computed by this role directly from bprime2_rows.jsonl (sha256 dadabaaea914485e387b9c1f558f5f938a7b9905159b35000957aea2a340eeba) using the stored raw candidate logprobs, per-row coin bits, and generations, joined to the per-item lexicons of data/nsk1-clutrr/{items,headroom}.jsonl. All MEASURED-exploratory, same scope as the header.
analyst_recount.gate_offline_recompute: EXACT agreement with the summary at all 9 cells on keyacc_real/coin/role, Wilson bounds, and both paired sign tests, recomputed from raw logprobs only. TWO cells satisfy rule 2 in full: (12,16) and (16,16); the summary's pass_cell field records the first in sweep order. Ties: zero in every arm at every cell (the ties-count-as-failure conservatism was never exercised).
analyst_recount.disc_c100_replication: The reported-only disc-c100 arm (100 text-only-CORRECT items, disjoint from Swept by construction) shows the SAME two cells keying and the same seven cells dead: (12,16) real 0.900 (LB(z=2.5427) 0.798; paired vs coin p=1.9e-11, vs role p=5.8e-07), (16,16) 0.880 (LB 0.774; p=2.9e-08 / 1.6e-09); every lt in {8,12} cell 0.30-0.52; (20,16) 0.62 nominal. The keying is a property of the (harvest, injection) layer pair, not of the failure population - it reads out identically on items the model already answers correctly. Same-run, same-host, reported-only: an internal-consistency replication, NOT an independent one.
analyst_recount.breakage_sign_asymmetry: The C100 breakage secondary (real arm, both signs, free generation at alpha*=1.0, 100 gens per sign per cell) splits by sign in a content-consistent way EXACTLY at the keying cells: (12,16) minus-sign (toward bridge) breaks 32/100 with 28 of the broken generations emitting the bridge name, plus-sign breaks 16/100; (16,16) minus 34/100 (26 emit bridge) vs plus 13/100; at the dead lt=8 cells breakage is 1-11 per sign with no such asymmetry. Free-generation output at the keying cells is steered TOWARD the injected identity - weak, secondary, non-gated corroboration that the delivered content survives into generation - while also fixing the damage floor: even the 'helpful' plus-sign at alpha=1.0 breaks 13-16% of correct generations at the keying cells.
analyst_recount.pivot_secondaries_uninformative: The generation secondaries (keyed emission + rescue: real+ 22/200 vs deranged+ 33/200) were spec-fixed at the PIVOT cell (16,12), which the margin sweep measures as DEAD (real 0.46 ~ coin 0.455). They are therefore uninformative about the pass cells in either direction. Consequence carried into the bounds below: keyed free-generation RESCUE at the two keying cells is UNMEASURED - the breakage sign-asymmetry above is the only (secondary) free-generation signal at those cells.
analyst_recount.role_control_elevation: keyacc_role sits at 0.55-0.595 at 6 of 9 cells (Swept), including both pass cells. A weak generic role-direction transfer (top-vs-bridge direction readable from a WRONG item's vector) may exist; it was never gated, its paired-vs-coin test was not pre-declared, and nothing here claims it. Reported for successor designs: the role control earning ~+0.08 over chance is itself a candidate Stage-1 covariate.
analyst_recount.cost: 0.206 GPU-h / USD 0.226 / 752.7 s wall - x2.2 cheaper than B-prime for a strictly stronger read-out.

interpretation.disc_c100_op_instantiation_adjudication: CONFIRMED as a faithful, benign operational instantiation (the runner's single flagged choice). Facts, verified in the harness at commit b404754: the spec pins sigma-2 (Sattolo, seed 20260712) over SWEPT order only and leaves the reported-only disc-c100 deranged arm's donor map unpinned; the runner completed that clause with the SAME pinned Sattolo operator (same seed) over C100 ascending order, fixed-point-free asserted. Benign because: (a) every gate-bearing section 5 quantity is computed over Swept only - _run_disc writes disc-c100 results to a separate per_cell_c100 store and the verdict object never reads it; (b) C100 and Swept are disjoint by construction (asserted), so the two derangements share no items and no leakage path exists; (c) the operator is deterministic, seed-pinned, content-independent, and auditable - it cannot manufacture keying, only permute which wrong item's vector serves as each control. Registered as ASM-0341 [STIPULATED - a choice ratification, not a measurement]. It affects no gate, no verdict, and no number in this assessment's load-bearing chain; the disc-c100 recount above would carry the same reading under any fixed-point-free derangement.
what_bprime2_establishes: DELIVERY FINDING (the load-bearing one): internal-write delivery is now a MEASURED positive - the first and only positive delivery mode in the programme's topology. A norm-matched additive contrastive write of a counterfactual name-pair difference vector into the final prompt position at injection layer 16 is read out by the host's computation with keyed accuracy 0.81-0.85 (chance exactly 0.5), beating the arithmetic-chance coin control (p <= 1.4e-10) and the role-consistent deranged control (p <= 8.9e-07) at both cells, FWER <= 0.05 across the 9-cell family [MEASURED-exploratory: summary sha256 0ee800f7... + offline recompute in this record; scope: R3, entity form, alpha=1.0, teacher-forced margin read-out, n=200].

ITEM-SPECIFICITY: the role control separates item-keyed content from generic direction steering - the same deranged vector under the same key-to-sign assignment scores 0.58-0.595 where the real vector scores 0.81-0.85, and its margin effect is 3.5-4.8x smaller. What transfers is specific to the injected item's counterfactual pair [MEASURED-exploratory: same refs].

LAYER TOPOLOGY: keying is confined to injection layer lt=16 (2/3 depth) with harvest lh in {12,16}; it is absent at every lt in {8,12} cell (real indistinguishable from coin, including the pre-registered pivot (16,12)) and attenuated at lh=20 (0.605, ns after correction). Replicated cell-for-cell on the disjoint correct-item population (disc-c100 recount: 0.90/0.88 at the same two cells, dead elsewhere). The channel has a measured place, not just a measured existence [MEASURED-exploratory: cell_reports + recount].

INSTRUMENT VALIDITY, DEMONSTRATED NOT ASSUMED: the coin control's E[success] <= 0.5 by arithmetic held in practice at all 9 cells (max coin LB 0.423 at z=2.7730), the B-prime confound (perturbation frequency scoring as content) had no path to keyed success and produced none, ties were zero everywhere, the repro gate matched B-prime text-only 958/958, and the entire gate recomputes offline from stored raw logprobs. The ASM-0111 constraint set did its job: one redesign cycle turned an invalid instrument into a valid positive [MEASURED-exploratory: instrument_invalid_triggers all false + recount].

FREE-GENERATION COHERENCE AT FULL STRENGTH (secondary): alpha=1.0 injection leaves name-emission intact (calibration collapse 0.0156; C100 collapse 0-4 per 200) and steers free generation toward the injected identity at the keying cells (breakage sign asymmetry, 28/32 and 26/34 of minus-sign breaks emitting the bridge name) - at the measured cost of breaking 13-16% of correct generations even under the plus sign [MEASURED-exploratory: secondaries + recount; never gate-bearing].

CHEAPNESS OF THE CHANNEL PROBE CLASS: USD 0.23 and 0.21 GPU-h for a 9-cell, 3-arm, FWER-controlled channel-existence reading. The Stage-0 instrument family is now both valid and cheap [MEASURED: usd_estimate/gpu_h_estimate in the summary].
what_bprime2_does_not_establish: NOT real-generation gains: the gate read-out is a teacher-forced logprob MARGIN, not free generation. The spec-fixed generation secondary ran at the pivot (16,12), which turned out to be a dead cell, so keyed free-generation RESCUE at the two keying cells is UNMEASURED; the breakage sign-asymmetry is the only (secondary, non-gated) free-generation signal there. No statement of the form 'internal steering fixes answers' is licensed [STIPULATED: ASM-0340 scope rule].

NOT grounding integration: per the spec's own pre-fixed interpretation boundary, PASS-KEYED establishes content DELIVERY (at least echo-grade readable content); whether the computation integrates delivered content as grounding - uses it to get otherwise-failed items RIGHT rather than to echo the injected name - is Stage-1's question. ASM-0042's latent-timing band is NOT resolved by this outcome, per the spec's explicit carve-out.

NOT breadth: 2 of 9 cells, one host (1.7B), one form (CLUTRR entity, effectively two-candidate), one task family, one injection operator at one position, alpha at the ladder maximum only (keying below alpha=1.0 is unmeasured - the ladder calibrated collapse, not keying), n=200, single seed for the derangement. Every widening is EXTRAPOLATION.

NOT damage-free: at the measured strength the write breaks 13-16% of correct free generations at the keying cells even under the helpful sign, and 32-34% under the adverse sign. The internal channel is measured READABLE, not measured SAFE; the strength-vs-damage frontier is Stage-1 work.

NOT a verdict, and NOT citable in one: every row is phase:exploratory pre-freeze diagnostic data under ASM-0203 quarantine; the programme's verdict-grade bottom line (zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null) is unchanged; no nsk1 verdict object exists; nothing here feeds a freeze without a redesigned DRAFT record and its own gates.

NOT a statement that the text channel is fixed or that engine-external topologies are superseded: g2d's text-delivery negative and the f2b engine-external positive (confounded, audited) are both untouched.

NOT free of the shared-run caveat: the disc-c100 replication and the breakage asymmetry come from the same run, host, seed, and items as the gate; they are internal-consistency evidence, not independent replication.
interpretation.delivery_topology_update: The feasibility-synthesis delivery split (engine-external verification | text-content delivery | internal state-space delivery) updates in ONE cell: internal-steering moves EMPTY -> POSITIVE-WITH-SCOPE [MEASURED-exploratory: content-specific, item-keyed residual-stream delivery at R3, 2 of 9 cells (lt=16, lh in {12,16}), teacher-forced margin read-out at alpha=1.0, n=200, exploratory/quarantined, no real-generation or integration reading]. The text-delivery cell is unchanged (negative with measured mechanism, 3 hosts, g2d) and the engine-external cell is unchanged (f2b positive, correct-alignment-specific, confounded, audited). The delivery-topology picture is now: the only channel measured to DELIVER content the host can read is the internal write; the only channel measured to produce an END-TASK win is engine-external; the text channel is measured harmful. The synthesis document's own cell edit is owned by the synthesis's next revision, not this record (question stub below).

per_thesis_implications.correctness_thesis: First positive movement on the delivery half since f2b: grounding CAN reach a model through the internal channel - the thesis's usefulness half now has a measured delivery mechanism candidate at small scale, where before it had only engine-external verification and a dead text channel. What this does NOT yet license: any claim that delivered grounding improves correctness on any task (requires Stage-1 free-generation rescue at the keying cells), any claim about NL-boundary reachability, and any claim at verdict grade. The correctness thesis remains ALIVE-UNDETERMINED; its delivery sub-question upgrades from 'no measured mechanism' to 'one measured mechanism, integration untested'.
per_thesis_implications.efficiency_thesis: No direct update (B2P carries no cost-vs-capability contrast). Standing fork input only: if Stage-1 shows integration, a small host plus internal writes is a candidate topology alongside the f2b verifier-offload shape, and ASM-0040's 360M-few-shot revisit clause names the second rung. Not a claim.
per_thesis_implications.cross_experiment: Method export (pairs with the ASM-0041 lesson from B-prime): when a discrete success event can be produced by content-free perturbation, the fix is a read-out whose control is chance BY ARITHMETIC (coin-XOR over a paired margin), not merely a matched control arm. B2P is the programme's first measured case of the pattern working end-to-end: same host, same items, same channel question - invalid instrument to valid positive in one redesign cycle at 2.2x lower cost. The pattern (paired counterfactual key + coin-assigned control + role-consistent separator) generalizes to any two-candidate steering or delivery probe.

fork_recommendation.spec_branch: PASS-KEYED (spec section 5 rule 2) fires the pre-stated section 8 PASS path: nsk1 redesign at R3 with the internal-arm primary and Stage-1 calibration under a new/amended DRAFT record, both corpus contacts disclosed verbatim (ASM-0203 clause iv), 360M-few-shot as candidate second rung (ASM-0040 revisit clause). The maintainer owns the fork; this record recommends sequencing WITHIN that licensed path.
fork_recommendation.recommended: STAGE-1 FREE-GENERATION KEYED-RESCUE PROBE FIRST (rank 1), then the redesigned DRAFT record. The single largest inferential gap between this result and anything the flagship can use is teacher-forced-margin -> free-generation behaviour AT THE MEASURED KEYING CELLS - a gap this run cannot close because its generation secondaries were pivot-fixed at a dead cell. The designer should spec a bounded successor at cells (12,16) and (16,16) only (multiplicity 2, no new grid search): keyed emission + rescue-of-text-only-failures under real vs deranged-coin arms in free generation, an alpha ladder BELOW 1.0 (the keying-vs-damage frontier - does keying survive at alpha where the 13-16% plus-sign breakage does not?), >= 2 additional derangement seeds (single-seed robustness is the cheapest remaining attack), and the role arm carried as covariate. Same instrument family, same caps class (~USD 1-5 at measured throughput), phase:exploratory, fork-deciding only. WHY THIS ORDER: a rescue-positive makes the redesigned nsk1 record's rung logic and power real instead of extrapolated from margins; a rescue-negative (content readable but never integrated in generation) redirects Stage-1 toward read-out placement rather than a doomed campaign - either way the DRAFT record is written once, on measurements.
fork_recommendation.alternatives_deprioritised: Multi-cell-robustness as a standalone (folded into rank 1 - the seeds and alpha ladder ARE the robustness buy; a wider grid re-search is not needed when 7 of 9 cells are cleanly dead twice over); scale successor (premature - no integration reading, and scale spend on an echo-grade channel is exactly the extrapolation-as-premise failure mode the honesty rules block); promotion to a frozen record now (blocked by the spec's own text - freezing happens only through a redesigned nsk1 record with gates and a skeptic memo, never off a Stage-0 diagnostic; and the skeptic memo must attack the two-contact corpus discipline, which is easier to defend WITH a Stage-1 rescue reading in hand).
fork_recommendation.escalation: This recommendation is input to the maintainer's section 8 PASS path; nothing here authorizes spend or a spec freeze.

forks_resolved.fork: post-B-prime maintainer fork (REDESIGN rank 1, chosen by the maintainer 2026-07-10; the fork registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json recorded as OPEN)
forks_resolved.resolution: RESOLVED-PASS-KEYED: the commissioned control-unpassable redesign ran valid and PASSED at 2 of 9 cells with FWER <= 0.05. The section 8 PASS path (nsk1 redesign at R3 around internal delivery, Stage-1 calibration, disclosed contacts, 360M second-rung revisit) is now the licensed direction; sequencing recommendation recorded above (Stage-1 free-generation probe before the DRAFT rewrite).
forks_resolved.basis: bprime2_summary.json sha256 0ee800f7... + the offline gate recompute in this record

forks_resolved.resolution: OPEN - recommendation recorded: rank 1 Stage-1 free-generation keyed-rescue probe at the two measured keying cells (alpha ladder below 1.0, >= 2 extra derangement seeds); THEN the redesigned nsk1 DRAFT record; scale successor and any freeze deferred behind the rescue reading.

mechanism_state: internal residual-stream channel: POSITIVE-WITH-SCOPE - content-specific, item-keyed delivery MEASURED at R3 at (lh,lt) in {(12,16),(16,16)}, margin read-out, alpha=1.0, exploratory; integration/rescue in free generation UNMEASURED; text-delivery comparator: dead for freeze at R1/R2/R3 with measured mechanism (unchanged, g2d); engine-external verification: unchanged (f2b positive, correct-alignment-specific, confounded, audited); 360M-few-shot second rung: unlocked as revisit candidate if Stage-1 shows integration (ASM-0040)

questions_opened.question: Designer: spec the Stage-1 free-generation keyed-rescue probe at cells (12,16) and (16,16) - keyed emission + rescue of text-only failures, real vs deranged-coin arms, alpha ladder below 1.0 (keying-vs-damage frontier), >= 2 additional derangement seeds, role arm as covariate, bounded multiplicity 2, phase:exploratory, caps class <= USD 25 (likely USD 1-5 at measured throughput).

Extend docs/next/feasibility-synthesis.md's delivery-topology split: internal-steering cell EMPTY -> POSITIVE-WITH-SCOPE with this record's scope string verbatim (2/9 cells, margin read-out, alpha=1.0, no integration reading, exploratory). Owned by the synthesis's next revision, not this record.

Designer, after Stage-1 reads out: rewrite the nsk1 DRAFT record around the internal-arm primary per the section 8 PASS path - rung logic and power from measured Stage-1 rescue rates (not margin extrapolation), both corpus contacts disclosed verbatim, skeptic memo attacking the two-contact discipline (ASM-0203 clause iv).

The role control's mild elevation (0.55-0.595 at 6/9 Swept cells) suggests a weak generic top-vs-bridge direction transfer; carry it as a measured covariate in Stage-1 rather than a separate probe. No spend of its own.

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED dry-plan estimates, never measurements.

ledger_updates.statement: First positive delivery mode: additive norm-matched contrastive injection of a counterfactual name-pair difference vector at the final prompt position, injection layer 16 of 24, delivers item-specific content readable by SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct's computation - keyed accuracy 0.810/0.850 at (lh,lt)=(12,16)/(16,16) vs coin 0.510/0.505 (paired p 1.4e-10/4.1e-13) and role control 0.595/0.580 (p 8.9e-07/9.1e-11), FWER <= 0.05 over 9 cells; margin effect +2.8 vs role +0.6-0.8 vs coin ~0.
ledger_updates.scope: MEASURED-exploratory; n=200 swept text-only failures, 958-item covered set, pinned R3 checkpoint, teacher-forced paired margin read-out at alpha=1.0, fp32; flips no verdict

ledger_updates.statement: The keying replicates cell-for-cell on the disjoint text-only-CORRECT population (disc-c100, reported-only, analyst recount): 0.900/0.880 at the same two cells, dead at the same seven; and free-generation breakage at the keying cells is sign-asymmetric toward the injected identity (minus-sign 32-34% broken, 26-28 of them emitting the bridge name, vs plus-sign 13-16%).
ledger_updates.scope: same run, same host, same seed - internal-consistency evidence, not independent replication; reported-only arms

ledger_updates.statement: The coin-XOR keyed read-out (E[control success] <= 0.5 by arithmetic) is validated in practice: coin keyacc 0.43-0.52 at all 9 cells (max LB 0.423 at z=2.7730), zero ties, gate recomputable offline from stored raw logprobs, repro 958/958 vs B-prime text-only. The ASM-0111 successor-constraint set converted an INSTRUMENT-INVALID probe family into a valid positive in one redesign cycle at USD 0.23.
ledger_updates.scope: MEASURED-exploratory; this operationalization at R3 on the entity form

ledger_updates.statement: B2P: mechanical gate label PASS-KEYED (2 qualifying cells); instrument-invalid triggers all false; all9_kill false; the spec's section 8 PASS path (nsk1 redesign at R3 around internal delivery) is the licensed direction, maintainer-gated; keyed free-generation rescue at the pass cells UNMEASURED (pivot-fixed secondary landed on a dead cell) - recorded as the binding next measurement.
ledger_updates.scope: pre-freeze fork decision; nsk1 stays DRAFT/unfrozen; alpha=1.0 only; teacher-forced margins only

assumptions_resolved.outcome: superseded-for-successor-results per its own revisit condition
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Its revisit clause ('a redesigned probe with a control-unpassable read-out supersedes this rule for its own results') fired: B2P is that probe. The internal-write cell is no longer UNTESTED; ASM-0340 is the successor scope rule for the B2P result. ASM-0110 continues to govern citation of the B-PRIME numbers themselves.

B2P implemented clauses (a)-(d) (keyed counterfactual discrimination, paired margin, bounded 9-cell multiplicity, breakage-informed additive operator) and the constraint set's purpose - a read-out a content-free perturbation cannot pass in expectation - held in practice (coin <= chance at all cells). Remains the binding template for any future Stage-0-shaped probe on two-candidate forms.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0112 (direction-only mechanism reading, discrete gold-hit read-outs)
assumptions_resolved.outcome: resolved-by-circumvention per its own resolution path
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: B2P's margin read-out avoided the discrete gold-hit class entirely, and its operator contrast confirms the reading's usefulness: the same single-position final-token write that is source-blind under a discrete any-cell gold metric is cleanly source-KEYED under a paired continuous margin. The claim's measured core stands for discrete read-outs; its 'no usable signal from single-position injection' worry is now bounded to the read-out class, not the channel.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0200/0201/0202/0203 (B2P read-out, operator, grid/floor, contact discipline)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Read-out and controls behaved per construction (coin <= chance everywhere, zero ties); operator preserved coherence at alpha=1.0 (collapse 0.0156) as ASM-0201 predicted for the contrastive difference; grid/floor decided cleanly (2 pass cells, 7 dead); all 958 items re-touched - clause (iv) verbatim-disclosure now binds every future freeze on this corpus with TWO contacts to disclose.

assumptions_resolved.outcome: resolution path consumed - measured in-band where the channel exists
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Measured 0.810/0.850 (Swept) and 0.900/0.880 (C100 recount) at the keying cells, inside the prior's band; 0.42-0.61 at the seven dead cells. The prior was sizing-only and is now superseded by measurement within B2P's scope; it remains EXTRAPOLATION anywhere else and is no longer load-bearing for this line.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0042 (latent rescuability planning band at R3)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Per the spec's pre-fixed interpretation boundary: B2P probes deliverability, not latent rescuability; the band re-points to the Stage-1 free-generation probe.
Third replication of the host premise: text-only 0.7912 with 958/958 agreement against B-prime's correctness vector; the 360M-few-shot revisit clause is now live pending Stage-1 integration evidence.
B2P used donor-forward harvesting, not cached-steering extraction; ASM-0025 resolves at Stage-1 calibration as designed, which the PASS path now schedules.
